## Problem

What finance workflow or deployment problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler workarounds or related tools.

## Scope Notes

Does this affect imports, reconciliation, tax reporting, deployment, security, or UI?

## Data Safety

Do not include real bank exports, account numbers, personal transaction data, API tokens, or production database IDs.
